findings.title: robots.txt Returns HTML Instead of Text
findings.description: The robots.txt file is being intercepted by Angular SPA routing and returns HTML (200 OK, text/html) instead of a plain text file. This prevents search engines from reading crawl directives.
findings.impact: Search engines cannot read robots.txt directives; site treated as non-compliant
findings.root_cause: Nginx try_files rule routes all requests to index.html, including /robots.txt

recommendations.action: Create /src/robots.txt static file with proper directives
Add robots.txt to angular.json assets array
Update nginx.conf to explicitly serve static files

findings.title: sitemap.xml Returns HTML Instead of XML
findings.description: The sitemap.xml file returns HTML (200 OK, text/html) instead of XML. Search engines cannot parse the sitemap to discover pages.
findings.impact: Crawlers cannot fetch or parse the XML sitemap; no page inventory discovery
findings.root_cause: Same as robots.txt - Nginx try_files routing to index.html

recommendations.action: Create /src/sitemap.xml static file with proper XML format
Consider implementing dynamic sitemap generation at /api/sitemap.xml
Use Angular Universal with SSR for automatic sitemap generation

findings.title: Missing Critical Security Headers
findings.description: Multiple critical security headers are missing from HTTP responses.
findings.impact: Exposes site to protocol downgrade attacks, XSS, clickjacking, MIME sniffing, and privacy leaks
findings.root_cause: Nginx configuration missing security headers directives

recommendations.action: Add HSTS header
Add Content-Security-Policy
recommendations.code: add_header Content-Security-Policy "default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://kit.fontawesome.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; frame-ancestors 'none';" always;

recommendations.action: Add remaining security headers

findings.title: HTTP Does Not Redirect to HTTPS
findings.description: HTTP requests return 200 OK with full HTML content instead of redirecting to HTTPS. This creates mixed-protocol access and SEO issues.
findings.impact: Protocol downgrade vulnerability, mixed content warnings, SEO penalty for HTTP crawling
findings.root_cause: Nginx not configured to redirect HTTP to HTTPS

recommendations.action: Configure HTTP server block to redirect to HTTPS
Verify Cloudflare 'Always Use HTTPS' is enabled

findings.title: www Subdomain Redirects to HTTP Instead of HTTPS
findings.description: HTTPS requests to www.explore21.com redirect to HTTP (not HTTPS), causing protocol downgrade.
findings.impact: Protocol downgrade, broken HSTS, security vulnerability, SEO penalty
findings.root_cause: Nginx redirect rule not preserving HTTPS protocol

recommendations.action: Configure www redirect to preserve HTTPS

findings.title: No Server-Side Rendering (CSR-Only SPA)
findings.description: The site is a pure Client-Side Rendered (CSR) Angular SPA with no Server-Side Rendering. Initial HTML contains only an <app-root> placeholder; content renders after JavaScript execution.
findings.impact: Crawlers with limited JS support see empty page; slower indexing; poor Core Web Vitals; no per-page metadata on initial fetch
findings.root_cause: Angular SPA built without Universal/SSR configuration

recommendations.action: Implement Angular Universal for Server-Side Rendering
recommendations.code:
ng add @nguniversal/express-engine
npm run build:ssr
npm run serve:ssr

recommendations.action: Or: Implement prerendering for static pages
Benefits of SSR: faster LCP, dynamic meta tags per page, better social sharing, improved crawlability

findings.title: Missing Open Graph Tags (og:image, og:url)
findings.description: og:image and og:url meta tags are missing. Only og:title, og:description, and og:type are present.
findings.impact: Poor social media preview; no featured image when shared; reduced click-through from social shares

recommendations.action: Add og:image and og:url to base HTML
recommendations.code:
<meta property="og:image" content="https://explore21.com/assets/main-logo.png" />
<meta property="og:url" content="https://explore21.com/" />
<meta property="og:image:width" content="1200" />
<meta property="og:image:height" content="630" />

recommendations.action: Implement dynamic og tags per route using Angular Meta service
recommendations.code:
this.meta.updateTag({ property: 'og:image', content: imageUrl });
this.meta.updateTag({ property: 'og:url', content: window.location.href });

findings.title: Missing Structured Data (JSON-LD)
findings.description: No JSON-LD schema markup or other structured data detected. No Organization, WebApplication, or BreadcrumbList schemas.
findings.impact: No rich snippets in search results; no knowledge panel eligibility; missed featured snippet opportunities

recommendations.action: Add base Organization/WebApplication schema to index.html
Add per-page schemas dynamically using Angular Meta service
Validate with Google Structured Data Testing Tool

findings.title: Viewport Prevents User Zoom (user-scalable=no)
findings.description: Viewport meta tag includes user-scalable=no, preventing users from pinch-zooming on mobile devices.
findings.impact: Accessibility violation (WCAG 2.1 Level AAA); poor UX for vision-impaired users; potential Core Web Vitals penalty

recommendations.action: Remove user-scalable=no from viewport
Ensure touch targets are at least 48x48px (or 44x44px minimum)

findings.title: Large Contentful Paint (LCP) Likely Poor
findings.description: Based on source analysis, LCP is likely > 2.5s (Poor). No critical rendering optimization; JavaScript execution required before content renders.
findings.impact: Poor user experience; Core Web Vitals penalty in search rankings; low PageSpeed Insights scores

recommendations.action: Implement Server-Side Rendering (SSR) via Angular Universal
Preload critical resources
recommendations.code:
<link rel="preload" href="/styles.css" as="style">
<link rel="preload" href="/runtime.js" as="script">

recommendations.action: Optimize bundle size; enable gzip/brotli compression
Monitor with PageSpeed Insights and Google Analytics Core Web Vitals tracking

findings.title: Interaction to Next Paint (INP) Unknown
findings.description: INP (Interaction to Next Paint) is the current interactivity metric (replaced FID on March 12, 2024). Actual INP performance cannot be assessed from source code alone.
findings.impact: Need field data from PageSpeed Insights and CrUX API

recommendations.action: Check PageSpeed Insights for real-world INP data from CrUX
Install Google Analytics 4 with Web Vitals tracking to monitor user interactions
Optimize JavaScript execution for large datasets (blocks, transactions)

findings.title: Angular SPA Detection (is_spa reporting incorrect)
findings.description: Automated tools report is_spa=false on raw fetch, but actual HTML clearly shows Angular SPA structure with <app-root>, runtime.js, polyfills.js, main.js.
findings.impact: Confirms need for server-side rendering or proper CSR optimization for SEO

recommendations.action: Verify SPA detection with Playwright-based rendering

findings.title: No PWA Manifest or Service Worker
findings.description: No manifest.webmanifest file detected. No PWA support for offline functionality or installable web app.
findings.impact: Missing installable app experience; no offline support; reduced engagement metrics

recommendations.action: Create manifest.webmanifest file
Link manifest in index.html and add to Angular assets
Implement service worker for offline support

findings.title: No Explicit Cache-Control Headers
findings.description: Nginx not setting explicit Cache-Control headers. Cloudflare showing cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC, indicating bypassed cache.
findings.impact: Suboptimal caching behavior; slower performance; higher bandwidth costs

recommendations.action: Set Cache-Control for HTML (short cache)
Set Cache-Control for static assets (long cache with versioning)
Configure Cloudflare page rule to cache HTML for 5-10 minutes

findings.title: No IndexNow Protocol Support
findings.description: IndexNow protocol (by Microsoft) not implemented. Allows real-time index updates to Bing, Yandex, Naver.
findings.impact: Slower index updates for new content; Bing cannot be notified of changes in real-time

recommendations.action: Register at https://www.indexnow.org/ and get API key
Implement backend endpoint to ping IndexNow when new blocks/transactions added
Example: POST to https://api.indexnow.org/indexnow with site URL and API key
